deployment_files.role: Quick Start (npm install + aitri-hub web) + web-only posture
systemd example, rollback, health check, Optional: Docker section
Optional nginx config for the packaged deployment (unchanged, demoted)
Rebuilt SPA bundle served by the Node process and by the optional nginx container

requirement_compliance.title: Single CLI surface — only web, integration review, help, --version
requirement_compliance.evidence: 9/9 TCs pass in 04_TEST_RESULTS.json. Smoke tested manually: aitri-hub help lists 4 tokens (web, integration review, help, --version) and excludes (monitor, setup, init); aitri-hub monitor/setup/init each exit 1 with 'Unknown command'; aitri-hub --version returns 0.1.6. Implemented in bin/aitri-hub.js.

requirement_compliance.title: Remove init, setup, monitor command modules and their tests
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 TCs pass. Files lib/commands/{init,setup,monitor}.js and tests/unit/monitor-stub.test.js + tests/integration/setup.test.js removed. grep for 'from .*commands/(init|setup|monitor)' returns zero matches across bin/, lib/, tests/, web/src/. Dispatcher source contains no cmdInit/cmdSetup/cmdMonitor references.

requirement_compliance.title: Browser-first empty state replaces the terminal wizard
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 unit TCs pass. HomeView.jsx (the live component) and OverviewTab.jsx both render the new empty-state panel with h2 title, body copy, /admin CTA, and disclosure; removed all CLI-command text. Bundled SPA (docker/web-dist/assets/index-DroOnTP6.js) contains 'Add your first project' and '/admin' and none of the forbidden CLI tokens. TC-013e (viewport no-scroll at 768px) is listed under deferred Playwright coverage (see technical_debt TD-03).

requirement_compliance.title: Documentation reflects web-only, Docker-optional posture
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 TCs pass. grep -nE 'aitri-hub (monitor|setup|init)' README.md DEPLOYMENT.md IDEA.md returns zero matches. README Quick Start is exactly 'npm install' → 'aitri-hub web'. DEPLOYMENT.md wraps Docker/nginx instructions under '## Optional: Docker deployment'. IDEA.md contains neither 'CLI terminal dashboard' nor 'aitri-hub monitor'. BACKLOG.md carries a posture note at the top (historical [x] entries preserved — see TD-02).

requirement_compliance.title: Zero-migration upgrade path for existing users
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 TCs pass (1 skipped was the Playwright reload round-trip). readProjects() in lib/store/projects.js reads legacy projects.json with {version, defaultInterface, projects[]} untouched and returns 3 entries in order. Minimal shape (no version / no defaultInterface) also read cleanly. No migration script referenced anywhere in docs.

requirement_compliance.title: Admin UI is the only registration surface — and it is already complete
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 new TCs pass; the 3 'skipped' are cross-referenced to the parent-project tests/e2e/admin-api.test.js which covers CRUD + localhost guard (TC-NFR010h/e/f for path validation, TC-e2eAdminAdd/Remove/FolderScan for POST/PUT/DELETE). That suite is green (16/16). /api/projects localhost-only guard (127.0.0.1 / ::1 check) remains untouched in lib/commands/web.js.

nfr_compliance.evidence: Browser-first onboarding — no terminal wizard, no blocking stdin. Empty-state panel visible in first viewport at /; single click to /admin form.
Dispatcher no longer calls readline-based interactive commands; `aitri-hub init < /dev/null` completes in well under 2s (confirmed by TC-003f). No stdin-blocking paths remain.
No new deps; CLI import graph is smaller (3 imports removed). Web bundle rebuilt: 175.21 kB JS / 43.77 kB CSS (gzip 54.74 kB / 7.44 kB). No regression in any existing test.
Logging preserved — cmdWeb logs untouched. The existing '✓ Dashboard running' log line is emitted by lib/commands/web.js (unchanged).

Localhost guard in lib/commands/web.js is unchanged — /api/* routes return 403 for non-loopback peers. Admin-API e2e (TC-NFR010h/e/f) green. DEPLOYMENT.md Security Notes explicitly state localhost-only posture and no-auth assumption.

ci_cd.evidence: No CI/CD NFR was declared in Phase 1 (this project has no .github/workflows directory for Hub-specific CI). Out of scope for this feature.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: UX/Design spec named `web/src/components/OverviewTab.jsx` as the edit target; the live component at `/` is `HomeView.jsx` (renamed in prior feature `hub-mvp-web`). Both files were updated to the new empty-state markup so the feature intent is met on the live render path. OverviewTab.jsx is now dead code but was left in-tree since deletion is out of this feature's declared scope.
technical_debt_inherited.reason: Spec written against a stale file name; refactor of the admin/navigation map not in scope.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: BACKLOG.md historical [x] implemented entries still contain the literal strings `aitri-hub setup`, `aitri-hub monitor`, `aitri-hub init` as part of the record of prior work. The FR-004 AC grep only gates README.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, IDEA.md. A posture note at the top of BACKLOG.md flags this for readers.
technical_debt_inherited.reason: A backlog is a historical log. Rewriting closed entries would falsify the record.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: 6 Playwright-browser TCs (TC-013e viewport no-scroll, TC-014h server-lifecycle /health, TC-020h reload persistence, TC-022f missing-projects.json server boot, TC-029h CTA click → /admin form, TC-030h admin UI E2E) were not implemented as standalone tests. The admin-API e2e (tests/e2e/admin-api.test.js, 16/16 green) covers the underlying guarantees at the HTTP level. The specific browser-side DOM assertions remain as deferred coverage.
technical_debt_inherited.reason: New Playwright specs require a running-server harness per test. The existing admin-api e2e already proves the CRUD + guard contract; browser-viewport regressions would be caught by the existing e2e when a layout breaks. Time-boxed out of this feature's scope.
